---
title: "Projects & Decks"
toc: true
---

## Code

### Platelet whole-cell model

Extending the *wcEcoli* framework to model human platelet activation. Containerised simulation environment with a Dash exploration UI.

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-repo-181717?logo=github)](https://github.com/stevehaigh/platelet-wcm)

### Other repos

See [all repositories on GitHub](https://github.com/stevehaigh?tab=repositories).

## Slide decks

Drop `.pdf` (preferred) or `.pptx` files into the `decks/` directory in the repo and link them here. PDFs render cleanly in a browser; PowerPoints download.

- [Example: Platelet modelling — work in progress](decks/example.pdf)
- [Example: wcEcoli architecture walkthrough](decks/example.pdf)

::: {.callout-tip}
## Tip
For PowerPoint, export to PDF before committing. PPTX files inflate repo size quickly and don't preview in a browser. Or write future decks in [revealjs](https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/revealjs/) directly in Quarto.
:::

## Posters & writeups

A good place to link supplementary material, conference posters, or dissertation chapters once they're ready.
